title: updater-helm plugin configuration
description: Schema v1 for the updater-helm semrel plugin. Configure via SEMREL_* environment variables.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_FILE.description: Path to the Helm Chart.yaml file to update.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_APP_VERSION.description: Optional explicit appVersion value. If unset, the release version is used.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_UPDATE_APP_VERSION.description: When true, also update the appVersion field.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_APP_VERSION_ONLY.description: When true, update only appVersion and leave chart version unchanged.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_APP_VERSION_PREFIX.description: Optional prefix applied to appVersion, for example "v".

SEMREL_VERSION.description: Release version for the current semrel execution. semrel core may expose this as SEMREL_VERSION, SEMREL_TAG_NAME, or SEMREL_NEXT_VERSION depending on phase.

SEMREL_NEXT_VERSION.description: Calculated next release version when SEMREL_VERSION is not yet finalized.

SEMREL_DRY_RUN.description: When true, perform validation and logging only without executing side effects.
